seoTitle: Diamond Head vs Diggers Camp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Diamond Head and Diggers Camp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Diamond Head vs Diggers Camp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamond Head and Diggers Camp.
heading: Diamond Head vs Diggers Camp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamond Head, New South Wales and Diggers Camp, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diggers Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Diamond Head (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamond Head or Diggers Camp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamond Head has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Diggers Camp scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamond Head scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Diggers Camp scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamond Head or Diggers Camp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diggers Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
